name: Grocery Basket with Play Food- 18 Piece - Gigglescape™: Plastic, Ages 2+, Includes Play Fruit & Vegetables
description:
Your little one can enjoy play grocery shopping with this Grocery Basket with Food from Gigglescape™. This grocery basket toy set includes play fruit, vegetables, yogurt and more. Made of plastic, the pieces are packed in a grocery basket for a realistic shopping experience. Great for helping develop fine motor skills, creativity and problem solving, this set will provide hours of fun.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
